channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan President Defies China with Surprise Eswatini Visit
item.description: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te arrived in Eswatini for a surprise diplomatic visit, asserting Taiwan right to engage with the world despite Beijing calling him a rat and attempting to stop the trip.

item.title: 🚢 Two Dead as Migrant Boat Runs Aground in France
item.description: A small boat carrying 82 migrants ran aground on a beach in northern France, leaving two women dead and 16 injured. This is the third deadly incident involving Channel crossings in just over a month.

item.title: 🇮🇱✈️ Israel Approves Purchase of F-35 and F-15IA Fighter Jet Squadrons
item.description: Israel gave final approval to purchase two new combat squadrons of F-35 and F-15IA fighter aircraft from Lockheed Martin and Boeing, part of a $119 billion military buildup plan for the coming decade.

item.title: 🛢️🚨 Oil Tanker Hijacked Off Yemen Coast Near Somalia
item.description: An oil tanker was hijacked off the coast of Yemen and taken towards Somalia, marking the second such incident in the past 10 days amid ongoing regional instability.

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 Cuba Condemns New US Sanctions as Illegal and Abusive
item.description: Cuba denounced new US sanctions as illegal and abusive, adding to existing US oil blockade measures that have caused widespread blackouts and fuel shortages across the island nation.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇩🇪 NATO seeks answers from US on Germany troop cuts
item.description: NATO says it is working with the US to understand details of planned troop reductions in Germany, after Trump announced deeper cuts beyond the initial 5,000 withdrawal.

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 Russia's Primorsk Port Hit as Ukraine Launches Wave of Drone Strikes
item.description: Ukrainian drones attacked Russia's Baltic Sea port of Primorsk, temporarily setting it on fire, as Kyiv launched a wave of strikes on targets across Russia including shadow fleet tankers at Novorossiysk.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Where Germany's Economy Still Excels
item.description: Despite economic challenges, Germany remains a leader in specialized manufacturing and industrial innovation, with particular strengths in machinery, automotive, and chemical sectors.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Is Myanmar's Military Winning the Civil War?
item.description: Myanmar's military junta has intensified operations against resistance forces, but analysts question whether battlefield gains translate into sustainable control amid widespread opposition.

item.title: 🇹🇭 Bangkok's Beloved Street Food Culture at Risk as Vendor Crackdown Widens
item.description: Thai authorities are cracking down on street food vendors in Bangkok, raising concerns about the future of the city's iconic culinary culture and the livelihoods of thousands of small vendors.

item.title: 🇳🇿🇸🇬 New Zealand PM Christopher Luxon to Visit Singapore
item.description: New Zealand Prime Minister Christopher Luxon will visit Singapore for talks with Prime Minister Lawrence Wong, strengthening bilateral ties between the two nations.

item.title: 🌍⛽ America Will Pay Dearly for Its Energy Arrogance
item.description: Analysis examining how US energy policy decisions and strategic miscalculations are creating long-term consequences for American global influence and energy security.

item.title: 🇨🇳⛽ China's Commerce Ministry Blocks US Sanctions Against Five Refineries
item.description: China's commerce ministry said it has blocked US sanctions against five Chinese refineries, rejecting Washington's attempts to penalize companies for processing Iranian oil.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ Top Republicans Express Concern Over Trump Plan to Withdraw Troops from Germany
item.description: Senior Republican lawmakers on military oversight committees expressed concern about the Pentagon's plan to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany, questioning the strategic implications.

item.title: 🇰🇵⚔️ North Korea's Kim Casts Youth Vanguard as State Goals Amid Russia War
item.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un emphasized youth vanguard participation in state goals, as North Korea continues to support Russia's war effort in Ukraine through weapons supplies and personnel.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Russia, Ukraine Give Conflicting Accounts of Village Fighting in Sumy Region
item.description: Russian and Ukrainian forces provided contradictory accounts of fighting in a village in Ukraine's Sumy region, as the conflict continues along the northeastern front.

item.title: 🇱🇧🚨 Israeli Military Urges Southern Lebanon Residents to Evacuate Amid Operations
item.description: Israel's military urged residents of southern Lebanon to evacuate as operations continue, despite a ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hezbollah.

item.title: 🇵🇭🇨🇳 US-Philippines Deploy Anti-Ship Missile System in Batanes Near Taiwan
item.description: The United States and Philippines deployed an anti-ship missile system in Batanes province, strategically located near Taiwan, during joint military exercises.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC Agrees in Principle to Small Oil Output Quota Hike Without UAE
item.description: OPEC+ members agreed in principle to a modest oil output increase, though the UAE may not participate in the quota hike as the group manages production amid volatile global markets.

item.title: 🇮🇷💸 Millions of Jobs Lost as Iranians Battle Operation Economic Fallout
item.description: Iran's economy has lost millions of jobs due to the ongoing conflict with the US and Israel, with widespread economic damage affecting ordinary citizens.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇦🇪 Modi's UAE Visit Opens New Era for India's Middle East Policy
item.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to the UAE signals a new era in India's Middle East policy, strengthening economic and strategic ties with Gulf nations.

item.title: 🇩🇪🛡️ US Troop Drawdown Underlines European Defence Responsibility, Says German Minister
item.description: Germany's defence minister said the US troop withdrawal should spur Europe to strengthen its own defence capabilities, emphasizing the need for greater European self-reliance.

item.title: 🇺🇦🔥 Ukraine Strikes Oil Facilities Deep Inside Russia
item.description: Ukrainian drones continue to strike oil facilities deep inside Russian territory, with recent attacks targeting key infrastructure as Kyiv maintains pressure on Moscow's energy sector.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Says US Could Restart Iran Strikes If They Misbehave
item.description: President Trump warned the US could resume strikes on Iran if Tehran does not comply with US demands, as the suspended bombing campaign continues while negotiations stall.

item.title: 🇮🇶⛽ Iraq Says Oil Output Can Recover Within a Week Once Hormuz Crisis Ends
item.description: Iraq's deputy oil minister said the country can restore oil output and exports to normal levels within seven days of the Strait of Hormuz crisis ending.
